description_long: This is an elongated, oval-shaped cake with a smooth, pale pink icing covering the top surface. The cake is decorated with evenly spaced dollops of white meringue or whipped cream, interspersed with several round, textured pink confections that resemble raspberries or candy spheres. The base of the cake is a light golden-brown baked layer, visible around the edges beneath the icing. The overall appearance is whimsical and playful, with a focus on pastel colors and a soft, inviting texture. The cake is not presented on any visible plate or tray, and its decorations are arranged symmetrically along the length of the cake.
description: An oval cake with pale pink icing, topped with white meringue dollops and pink candy spheres, on a golden-brown base. The decorations are symmetrically arranged for a playful, pastel look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the cake, with pink icing, white meringue dollops, and pink spheres clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the cake and the height of the decorations, with the pink icing and toppings stacked along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the decorations and the golden-brown cake edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the cake's thickness and the layered effect of the icing and toppings.
